text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: MBSF 30 CCW Chronic Conditions (CHRONIC) File │ March 2022 │ V 1.0 25 

CANCER_UROLOGIC 

LABEL: Urologic Cancer (kidney, renal pelvis, and ureter) End-of-Year Indicator 

DESCRIPTION: This variable indicates whether a beneficiary met the Chronic Conditions Warehouse (CCW) criteria for 
urologic cancer (kidney, renal pelvis, and ureter) as of the end of the calendar year. 

SHORT NAME: — 

LONG NAME: CANCER_UROLOGIC 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 1 

SOURCE: CCW
